title: Extra Levels!
description: Doubles all vanilla enchantment level caps and makes higher-levels cheaper to get.
body:
## Double the enchantment cap, easier upgrades.

Extra Levels! is a simple Minecraft datapack that enhances enchanting without breaking balance:

🔹 Doubles the maximum level of all vanilla enchantments

🔹 Reduces the per-level cost scaling, making higher-level enchantments cheaper to get
